selection_policy.backend: Ollama / local OpenAI-compatible HTTP where available
selection_policy.scope: Second-pass non-MLX candidates with tool, factual, and coding plausibility on the Mac mini.

excluded.reason: Too large for a full 100-prompt + tool + OpenClaw + coding suite on a 16GB Mac mini.
